Blade: Trinity (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $52,397,389Details
International Box Office $78,955,776
Worldwide Box Office $131,353,165
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$16,061,271 (30.7% of total gross)
Legs:3.26 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:39.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$65,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,912 opening theaters/2,912 max. theaters, 4.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $95,621,523

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 8th, 2004 (Wide) by New Line
International Releases: December 24th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: April 26th, 2005 by New Line Home Video
MPA Rating: R for strong pervasive violence and language, and some sexual content.
Running Time: 113 minutes
Franchise: Blade
Cast, crew, or production detail: Visual Effects
Plot point: Monster, Vampire
Source material: Marvel Comics
Subgenre: Action Horror
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Action
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Super Hero
Production/Financing Companies: Amen Ra Films, Imaginary Forces
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
